_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin deficiency predicts FAK inhibitor sensitivity: a synthetic lethal relationship.

_contextSnippet: 7 of the 10 most sensitive cell lines (average EC 50 = 0.24 μM) lack Merlin protein expression...Among the 37 less sensitive cell lines (average EC 50 = 1.85 μM)
details: Average EC50 of 0.24 μM in 7 of 10 most sensitive Merlin-negative cell lines vs 1.85 μM in 37 less sensitive cell lines
